nodes.label: Amazon Redshift
why: Native AWS integration reduces VPC egress costs to near zero
Redshift Spectrum queries S3 cold data without loading — saves storage cost
Column-level encryption meets PCI-DSS data-at-rest requirements
Concurrency Scaling handles burst reporting without cluster resize
tradeoffs: Vacuum and analyze required regularly — add to Airflow maintenance DAGs
Concurrency Scaling adds ~$0.013/second — watch for runaway queries
Snowflake would outperform at 10TB+ — revisit at growth stage

warnings.msg: ⚠ PCI-DSS + Startup budget: PCI compliance audit costs $15–50K/yr — ensure this is budgeted separately from infrastructure.

output.summary: AWS-native analytics stack optimized for SOC2/PCI compliance with hourly batch processing. Small team tooling prioritizes managed services to minimize operational burden.

nodes.label: Google Pub/Sub
why: Serverless — no broker sizing, auto-scales to millions of messages/sec
Native Dataflow integration enables exactly-once stream processing
GDPR-compliant: messages deleted on ACK, no long-term retention by default
Global topics support multi-region event ingestion for GDPR data residency
tradeoffs: No consumer groups — Dataflow or custom code needed for ordered processing
Kafka-compatible API (Pub/Sub Lite) has higher latency than native Kafka
At 10TB+/day message costs exceed managed Kafka — evaluate Pub/Sub Lite

warnings.msg: ⚠ GDPR + Large scale streaming: Ensure PII fields are encrypted at Pub/Sub topic level and implement right-to-erasure pipeline for stored event data.

output.summary: GCP-native real-time streaming architecture leveraging serverless Pub/Sub and Dataflow for GDPR-compliant event processing at enterprise scale.
